arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher predicts Liverpool will sign player who out-performed Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has urged Liverpool to sign Fulham left back Antonee Robinson in January

arts.ttl: Liverpool star Ibrahima Konate responds to Arsenal taunt after Bukayo Saka injury
arts.sum: In response to an Arsenal fan who said "rivalry aside, I hope Konate's injury is serious," the Frenchman took to Twitter before Liverpool's win against Tottenham, saying: "We are not like them, we wish no harm. Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate extended a hand of sportsmanship towards Arsenal, stating that they "wish no harm" following Bukayo Saka's injury during the Gunners' 5-1 triumph over Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: 'If we had gone into the dressing room' - Arne Slot makes incredible Liverpool claim
arts.sum: Arne Slot reacts after Liverpool's 6-3 win over Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League

arts.ttl: 'You know as well as I' - Arne Slot makes Liverpool title admission after Chelsea 'surprise'
arts.sum: Arne Slot discussed Liverpool's lead at the top of the Premier League after winning at Tottenham

arts.ttl: Manchester City transfer latest: Update on Premier League target as Pep Guardiola looks to beat Liverpool, Arsenal to signing
arts.sum: Manchester City will reportedly look to sign a star Premier League attacker for £80m from under the noses of their rivals in a bid to rejuvenate the faltering champions.

arts.ttl: Why 'exceptional' Szoboszlai was key to Liverpool win
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2's Jason Mohammad and Glenn Murray discuss Dominik Szoboszlai's "absolutely fantastic" performance for Liverpool during their 6-3 win over Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville admits what he's got completely wrong about Arne Slot as Liverpool beat Tottenham
arts.sum: Gary Neville had admitted he got something very wrong he said about Arne Slot under Liverpool as his team thrashed Tottenham 6-3. Liverpool moved four...

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans lose faith with Ange Postecoglou after Liverpool hammering - 'Out of his depth'
arts.sum: Tottenham's 6-3 defeat to Liverpool has led to some fans demanding embattled manager Ange Postecoglou be sacked, having already overseen eight losses in the Premier League this season

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou loves what Tottenham fans chanted despite being thrashed by Liverpool
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has admitted that he loved what Tottenham Hotspur’s supporters were singing despite their team losing 5-2 to Liverpool. Tottenham ended the game being...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hails his Liverpool side and insists they could have scored even more against Tottenham but refuses to get carried away in title race
arts.sum: In the last seven seasons when Liverpool have been top of the table at Christmas they have only won the league once and their Dutch boss refused to get carried away.
